prompt: A dark fantasy illustration of a single floating woman centered in the frame, shown as a near-black silhouette against an intense glowing crimson background. She hovers a little above a reflective black-red water surface, barefoot, with both arms relaxed and slightly extended downward, fingers softly spread, her posture calm but powerful. Her very long black hair streams dramatically to the left in wild windblown tendrils, and her gown is a shredded, smoky, semi-translucent black dress with layered ribbons and torn fabric trailing downward into shadowy wisps. Behind her is one enormous ornate circular magic sigil, perfectly framing her body like a halo, rendered in intricate gothic filigree, concentric rings, and arcane lace-like geometry, glowing bright blood red with a hot white-red core. The entire scene is dominated by a black and deep red palette, with swirling smoke, embers, and magical energy filling the air. At the lower left and lower right edges are 2 clusters of sharp red crystals emerging from darkness. The bottom of the image shows one glossy reflective pool with rippling crimson highlights mirroring the light above. Make the atmosphere infernal, mystical, and regal, as if a dark sorceress is awakening in a forbidden ritual chamber. High contrast, cinematic backlighting, volumetric glow, ultra-detailed digital painting, vertical composition, centered symmetrical framing, ominous elegance, no text, no extra characters, no visible facial details.
